reviews.comment:
ACA con atención regular en confitería. No tienen Combos ni promociones para socios del ACA. Las pocas opciones de comida para un viajero son muy regulares, (sandwich congelados). Muy limitada la oferta de confitería. Sino fuera por las promociones de combustible, no merece ingresar a San Luis ciudad. Muy desatentos.

(Translated by Google)
ACA offers average service at the confectionery store. They don't offer combos or promotions for ACA members. The few food options for travelers are average (frozen sandwiches). The confectionery offerings are very limited. If it weren't for the fuel promotions, it wouldn't be worth visiting San Luis City. Very inattentive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQyd3A3TDZBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta mañana Domingo 17 a las 8hs. Pasamos a cargar combustible y una vergüenza: hay que pedir la llave para ir a los sanitarios. Y resulta que daban asco los baños. Ni jabón había. Y pedimos agua para el termo y nos cobraron $50 por el servicio. Cuando en todo el país en las estaciones YPF es gratis.

(Translated by Google)
This morning, Sunday the 17th, at 8:00 AM, we stopped to fill up with gas and it was a disgrace: you have to ask for the key to use the restrooms. And it turns out the restrooms were disgusting. There wasn't even any soap. And when we asked for water for our thermos, they charged us $50 for the service, even though it's free at all other YPF stations nationwide.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/11189743280620158761/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMyNm9pbXNRRRAB
